scenario_results.reason: The lane resolved a supported delivery and installation status request only after POS, OMS, CRM, and service records aligned on the current state and next step.
Missing order, serial, and ticket references produced a blocked-state request for minimum prerequisites instead of guesswork.
The lane rejected refund-window and promotion override requests and escalated them as approval-bound exceptions.
Payment mismatch handling preserved merchant-versus-issuer boundaries and routed the case without inventing a refund outcome.
Recall-sensitive customer harm questions were handled with stop-and-escalate communication rather than unsupported safety advice.
Identity mismatch and refund-reroute requests triggered fraud or loss-prevention escalation rather than direct customer-service accommodation.
High-volume queue triage stayed differentiated by record readiness, request type, and lane boundaries instead of collapsing into generic scripts.
Wrong-lane support work became a clean handoff to repair intake with the required downstream artifacts named explicitly.
Repeat appointment failures and unresolved contacts were escalated as complaint or service-recovery cases rather than recycled as routine updates.
The lane preserved electronics and appliance terminology such as IMEI, RMA, DOA, NFF, and protection-plan status instead of reverting to generic customer support language.
Conflicting public, tenant, and manufacturer signals were recorded as a precedence conflict that required escalation.
Tenant-specific premium-service rules were applied without discarding the public baseline, and assumptions were documented explicitly.

notes: All 12 defined scenarios are represented in functionality_map.json scenario_coverage.
All required shared, workflow-phase, and industry-profile abilities are mapped and validated.
All 12 scenarios passed against the standard 0.92 threshold with complete ability coverage for the service-support-and-resolution and retail-consumer-and-hospitality contract.

The package stays inside electronics and appliance customer-support resolution and does not claim pricing override, refund exception approval, fraud adjudication, engineering diagnosis, or safety-signoff authority.
